name: io.github.dchhill/vedavisor-vedic-astrology-mcp
title: VedaVisor Vedic Astrology MCP
description: Professional-grade Vedic astrology calculations and personalized in-depth predictions: birth charts, dashas, yogas, compatibility, panchanga, muhurta, prashna, and the chart-aware Cosmic Advisor. The only MCP server that reads your chart like a real astrologer, not a template. Cosmic Advisor tools deliver multi-paragraph, chart-specific interpretation grounded in classical Jyotish.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using a VedaVisor MCP API key (vv_live_ prefix) or Supabase OAuth JWT. Example: Bearer vv_live_YOUR_KEY
